regime_fall.current_status: U.S. and Israeli air campaign has executed approximately 9,000 strikes on Iranian military targets with three amphibious ready groups (carrying 7,000+ Marines) and 50,000+ U.S. troops positioned for potential ground operations; the military-dominated regime continues rejecting ceasefire terms and Israel recognition demands despite massive capability degradation, while VP Vance signals potential near-term exit pending Iranian concessions.
regime_fall.last_major_event: President Trump announced a 10-day suspension of strikes on Iranian power plants until April 6, 2026, following an Iranian request, while continuing operations elsewhere and expressing doubt on a peace deal dependent on Iranian leadership concessions.
